name: Captain
character: Sets the vision & commitment — and sees everyone else.
blurb: You are the Captain. Your job isn't to know every detail — it's to point the ship at the cloud and get everyone rowing together.

name: Finance-Pros
blurb: You live in reports and closing cycles. Time to spot where real-time could give you back your evenings.

name: Tech Team
blurb: Keepers of the system. Let's see what custom code is still needed and sort what data comes along to the cloud.

name: Ops-heroes
blurb: Every process step is a chance to remove friction. Which ones quietly drive everyone crazy?

name: People-Chamions
blurb: Change management and training are your focus. Ensure the people are ready for the cloud.
